languages.text: "Мне нравится твоя идея, Маражай. Проследи, чтобы мы использовали разборки врагов на полную".
"I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."
languages.original_text: "Мне нравится твоя идея, Маражай. Проследи, чтобы мы использовали разборки врагов на полную".

traits.locale_text: "I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."
"I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."
"I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."

languages.text: 「あなたの考えはいいと思う、マラザイ。敵同士の争いを最大限に利用するように」
languages.original_text: "I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの考えはいいと思う、マラザイ。敵同士の争いを最大限に利用するように。」

languages.text: «Me gusta la idea, Marazhai. Aprovechemos la vulnerabilidad que el conflicto provoca entre nuestros enemigos».
languages.original_text: "I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."

traits.locale_text: «Me gusta la idea, Marazhai. Aprovechemos la vulnerabilidad que el conflicto provoca entre nuestros enemigos».

languages.text: “我欣赏你的策略，玛拉斋。去吧，务必将敌人之间的冲突利用到极致。”
languages.original_text: "I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."

traits.locale_text: “我欣赏你的策略，玛拉斋。去吧，务必将敌人之间的冲突利用到极致。”

languages.text: "Eure Idee gefällt mir, Marazhai. Seht zu, dass wir den Konflikt unserer Feinde bestmöglich mutzen."
languages.original_text: "I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Idee gefällt mir, Marazhai. Seht zu, dass wir den Konflikt unserer Feinde bestmöglich mutzen."

languages.text: "Fikrini beğendim Marazhai. Düşmanlarımızın çatışmasından sonuna kadar faydalandığımızdan emin olalım."
languages.original_text: "I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."

traits.locale_text: "Fikrini beğendim Marazhai. Düşmanlarımızın çatışmasından sonuna kadar faydalandığımızdan emin olalım."

languages.text: « Votre idée me plaît, Marazhai. Veillons à exploiter au mieux le conflit qui oppose nos ennemis. »
languages.original_text: "I like your idea, Marazhai. See to it that we exploit our enemies' conflict to the fullest."

traits.locale_text: « Votre idée me plaît, Marazhai. Veillons à exploiter au mieux le conflit qui oppose nos ennemis. »
